title: Iran State Tobacco Monopoly (Tobacco Regie -> Dokhaniyat) — Concession Terms, Revenue Share, Production & Scale, 1890-1995
source_org: Encyclopaedia Iranica (article 'DOKANIYAT' by Willem M. Floor); UK House of Commons Hansard; Wikipedia 'Tobacco Protest' (secondary aggregator of primary historical accounts)
extraction_method: MANUAL TRANSCRIPTION of numeric values embedded in narrative prose across three sources. The primary source (Encyclopaedia Iranica DOKANIYAT article) was read in full via the Claude Browser tool's get_page_text (iranicaonline.org blocks WebFetch with HTTP 403); the 1890-92 concession figures were cross-checked against UK Parliament's own historic Hansard record of the 23 May 1892 House of Commons debate on the Persian Tobacco Concession (an official/primary transcript, not a secondary retelling) via WebSearch synthesis. No interpolation or estimation was performed.
retrieved_by: claude (manual transcription from live-rendered Encyclopaedia Iranica page text + Hansard citation)
time_coverage: 1890-1995 (non-continuous; only years explicitly cited in the narrative are captured)
units: mixed: GBP, rials, acres, tons, cigarettes-per-day, workforce headcount, percent -- see unit column per row
license_terms: Encyclopaedia Iranica content copyrighted, used here for non-commercial research/citation with full attribution; Hansard is UK Parliament public record (Open Parliament Licence).
notes: This dataset fills the pre-1961 gap that FAOSTAT cannot cover (FAOSTAT's Iran tobacco series, confirmed present in data/raw/faostat/tcl-trade-crops-livestock/, begins only in 1961) and adds fiscal/monopoly-structure detail (concession terms, tax-revenue share, workforce scale) that FAOSTAT, being purely an agricultural production/trade database, never captures regardless of year. The 1940 production figures (30,000 acres, 13,500 tons/year) are a genuine, singular pre-FAOSTAT data point bridging the Qajar-era Tobacco Regie (1890-92) narrative to the modern FAOSTAT-covered era (1961-present). The 1890 GBP 371,875 'projected annual profit' figure is explicitly flagged in its own notes field as a promotional/prospectus projection that was never realized (the concession was annulled in 1892 before full operation) -- included for context on the scale of profit promised to investors, not as a real fiscal outcome.
failures: No year-by-year tobacco-tax-revenue-in-rials series was found for the full Pahlavi period (only single-year snapshots: 1929's 3.5% of total revenue, and the unrelated 1934 syndicate capitalization figure) -- a continuous revenue series was sought but not located in freely accessible sources this session.
No data found on the modern (post-2012 privatization) Iran Tobacco Company's revenue or production, beyond general market-research paywalled sources (Statista) that were not accessed.
